headline: Why F5 (FFIV) Stock Is Down Today
summary: Shares of application security provider F5 (NASDAQ:FFIV) fell 4.2% in the afternoon session after its President and CEO, Francois Locoh-Donou, sold over $1 million worth of company stock. The transaction involved the sale of 3,334 shares at a price of $300 each.
